title: ATSC 3.0 Broadcast
short description: The Advanced Television Systems Committee (ATSC) 3.0 standard (marketed as NextGen TV) is a revised set of video broadcasting specifications that outlines improvements to spectrum efficiency.
description: The **Advanced Television Systems Committee (ATSC) 3.0** standard (marketed as **NextGen TV**), is a revised set of video broadcasting specifications which outlines improvements to spectrum efficiency.
